name: phactoryfit
description: Security-hardened PhactoryFit PWA with Universal Food Search, a 1,348-record offline U.S. menu catalog, 422-brand restaurant recognition, optional secure Nutritionix/FatSecret/USDA Food Cloud providers, editable timed diary, barcode logging, and cosmic UI.

scripts.audit:security: npm run test:static && npm run test:service-worker && npm run test:browser-security && npm run test:restaurant && npm run test:restaurant-data && npm run test:restaurant-brands && npm run test:food-cloud && npm run test:ui && npm run test:camera && node --check app.js && node --check restaurant-foods.js && node --check restaurant-foods-expanded.js && node --check restaurant-brands.js && node --check food-cloud/worker.js && node --check service-worker.js && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
